result.summary: Analyzed sub_layer_0_01_ai_system: 42 files, contains AALang (AI programming language) and GAB compiler

content.purpose: PRIMARY AI SYSTEM - AALang is a programming language designed to run entirely within LLMs. It provides a formal, graph-native language specification using JSON-LD format that LLMs execute with greater consistency and fewer hallucinations compared to standard prompt engineering.

gab.description: Generic AALang Builder - An intelligent agent compiler that uses a 4-mode-13-actor pattern

aalang.description: Actor-based Agent Language - Programming language for LLM agent consumption and execution

aatest.description: Comprehensive testing framework for AALang products

compressor.description: Huffman v2 compression tools for AALang files

tests.description: Test suites for GAB and AATest

directories.Compressor: Compression utilities (3 jsonld, 2 py, 3 aacomp, 1 md)

content.integration: Used throughout entire layer-stage system at every layer, stage, sub_layer, and sub_stage
